data.title: Aalo Atomics starts construction on experimental nuclear reactor Aalo-X next to Idaho National Laboratory, aiming for criticality by July 4th, 2026. Selected by the U.S. DOE for pilot program.
data.description: Aalo Atomics, based in Austin, Texas, has begun construction on Aalo-X, the initial experimental extra modular nuclear reactor (XMR). The facility is set to be erected adjacent to Idaho National Laboratory (INL)'s Materials and Fuels Complex. Aalo aims to finish construction and attain criticality for the reactor by July 4th, 2026. The groundbreaking ceremony occurred shortly after Aalo was chosen by the U.S. Department of Energy (DOE) to engage in Pr.

data.title: U.A.W. ahead in vote at Ford & SK On battery venture. Narrow majority but outcome uncertain due to contested ballots.
data.description: The U.A.W. secured a slight majority in their attempt to represent workers at a factory jointly owned by Ford and SK On, though the final outcome remains uncertain due to contested ballots.

data.title: Ex-FTX legal advisors deny involvement in $X billion fraud, seek lawsuit dismissal citing lack of awareness of wrongdoing.
data.description: Former legal advisors of FTX claim they offered standard legal services and had no knowledge of the exchange's fraud scheme involving billions.
